name: secret-expiry-monitor
description: CSA Loom secret-expiry monitor — timer-triggered Azure Function (S1). On a cron it inventories the MSAL app registration's passwordCredentials (Microsoft Graph) + tracked Key Vault secret attributes, computes days-to-expiry, and fires the shared Loom action group + a dedup GitHub issue at the 60/30/7-day thresholds — prevention for the 2026-07-19 expired-MSAL-secret sign-in outage class. Azure-native, identity-based auth, no keys.
